title: 99acres Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: 99acres Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the 99acres Asia Pacific Associates family as a Full Stack Developer in Meerut. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About 99acres Asia Pacific Associates:
99acres Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres Asia Pacific Associates!
